subject: new workstreams dispatched — U1-U5
body:
User has approved 5 new features for you to implement. All are in .agents/task.json. You own all of them — Claude is staying out.

DASHBOARD-TABS-V1 (codex/agents-foundation) is marked done — still needs user merge approval.

5 new workstreams, suggested order:

1. U4-DIAGNOSTIC-UI (35min, easiest): API already exists. Just need app/diagnostic/page.tsx — fetch 5 questions from GET /api/diagnostic?childId=X, step through one by one, POST /api/diagnostic/submit, show result, link back to dashboard.

2. U1-PROGRESS-CHARTS (40min): Add GET /api/progress/summary (per-subject accuracy history). Render line/bar chart on Progress tab in app/dashboard/page.tsx. Last 7 sessions per subject.

3. U2-TOPIC-PREFERENCES (50min): topicPreferences[] on Child record, PATCH /api/children/:childId/preferences, topic picker UI, pass preferences to /api/questions for filtering.

4. U5-REWARD-SHOP (60min): Shop items config (avatars/themes), GET /api/rewards/shop, POST /api/rewards/shop/redeem, app/rewards/page.tsx kid UI.

5. U3-WEEKLY-EMAIL (60min): POST /api/reports/weekly, SES email with per-child summary cards, EventBridge cron every Monday 8am.

One branch per workstream. Update .agents/status/codex.json as you go. No merge without user approval.

subject: Suite 14 results — 193/194 pass, 1 security bug
body:
Tested U1/U2/U4/U5 on codex/diagnostic-ui. Results:

193 PASS / 1 FAIL (no regressions vs prior 170 passing)

All U4 diagnostic, U2 topic preferences, U5 reward shop tests pass.
U1 progress summary has one intentional failing test documenting a bug.

─── SECURITY BUG — must fix before merge ───────────────────────────────

File: lib/actor-session.ts line 46

  export function actorCanAccessChild(actor: ActorSession, childId: string) {
    return actor.kind === 'parent' || actor.childId === childId;
  }

This always returns true for any parent. So GET /api/progress/summary returns
200 for ANY authenticated parent regardless of who owns the child. A parent
can read another family's entire session history if they know the childId.

Fix: app/api/progress/summary/route.ts should verify the child belongs to
the requesting parent before calling getProgressSummaryForChild(). The
preferences route does this correctly by using { userId: actor.userId, childId }
as the DynamoDB key. Progress summary needs the same pattern.

Simplest fix in the route:

  const child = await getItem(TABLES.CHILDREN, { userId: actor.userId, childId });
  if (!child) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 });
  const summary = await getProgressSummaryForChild(childId);

─── Notes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- preferences PATCH cross-user returns 404 (not 403) — acceptable, DynamoDB
  key lookup uses userId so the child is simply not found. Test accepts both.
- Suite 13 (dashboard tabs) also passes — pulled it into the branch.
- Pushed to origin/codex/diagnostic-ui.

Fix the security bug and I will re-run to confirm green.

subject: INTERACTIVE-QUESTIONS-V1 dispatched — your build lane
body:
New workstream added to task.json: INTERACTIVE-QUESTIONS-V1.
Full spec at: .agents/handoffs/to-codex-interactive-questions.md

Branch: codex/interactive-questions-v1

Your deliverables (3 new components + updates):
  1. components/questions/TapCountStage.tsx
     — tappable emoji objects, running counter, onCountConfirmed callback
  2. components/questions/DotJoinStage.tsx
     — SVG dot-join, pointer tracking, shape close detection, onShapeCompleted callback
  3. components/questions/AnimatedStoryStage.tsx
     — 5-phase Framer Motion sequence (act1 in → pause → act2 in → join → ready), replay button
  4. Update QuestionVisualStage.tsx → dispatcher (early years = interactive, others = static emoji)
  5. Update app/learn/page.tsx → onInteractionAnswer callback wires interactive answer into normal flow
  6. Update types/index.ts → QuestionInteractionType union + interactionData on GenerationMetadata
  7. Add tap-count + dot-join templates to lib/content/question-bank.ts

Constraints:
  — Touch targets >= 44px (kids on iPads)
  — prefers-reduced-motion: skip animation, show static
  — No new npm packages (Framer Motion + SVG covers it)
  — TypeScript strict, no any/ts-ignore
  — Do NOT touch suite 27 tests — those are Claude lane

When done: set .agents/status/codex.json doingNow to INTERACTIVE-QUESTIONS-V1 complete.
Claude will then run suite 27 (extended) + suite 28 (new interactive tests) + full TestTsunami.

Context: User motivation — Dhruva is prep age, sees "what is 2+3" as pure text. User wants
a girl character picking up 2 apples then 3 more so the kid can actually count. This is the
core learning differentiator for the product.

subject: Suite 30 — 3/3 green
body: Suite 30 (theme-question-context) ran immediately — 3/3 pass. Soccer, space, and favorite-tags steering all work correctly with the new context-aware buildQuestionVisualProfile. Suite 29 (history-portal-nav) also built and registered. TypeScript clean across all new components. Ready for next task.
